title: subquery with limit clause fails as EXISTS operand
poc: CREATE TABLE t3(a TEXT PRIMARY KEY, b TEXT, x INT) WITHOUT ROWID;
CREATE TABLE t4(c TEXT COLLATE nocase, y INT);
SELECT a FROM t3 WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM t4 WHERE (a,x)=(c,y) LIMIT 1);
key_bug_features: EXISTS clause fails with LIMIT in subquery
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t5(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, value REAL);
CREATE TABLE t6(ref_id INTEGER, description TEXT, FOREIGN KEY(ref_id) REFERENCES t5(id));
SELECT name FROM t5 WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM t6 WHERE (id, value) = (ref_id, 2.2) LIMIT 1);
